problem_text_en:
4-1 As shown in Figure 4-1, a small ball of mass m has a horizontal velocity v to the right at a certain instant. The distances of the ball from vertices A, B, C of the rectangle are $d_{1}$, $d_{2}$, $d_{3}$, respectively, and they satisfy $d_{2}^{2}=d_{1}^{2}+d_{3}^{2}$. Find:
(1) The torque of the gravitational force on the ball about points A, B, and C.
(2) The angular momentum of the ball about points A, B, and C.
problem_solution_cn:
(1) 据力矩定义式$M = \mathbf{r} \times \mathbf{F}$, 得
$$
M_A \begin{cases}
\text{方向: 垂直图平面朝里}, \\
\text{大小: } M_A = mgd_1,
\end{cases}
$$
$$
M_B = M_A,
$$
$$
M_C = 0.
$$
(2) 据角动量定义式$\mathbf{L} = \mathbf{r} \times m\mathbf{v}$, 得
$$
L_A = 0,
$$
$$
L_B \begin{cases}
\text{方向: 垂直图平面朝里}, \\
\text{大小: } L_B = mvd_1,
\end{cases}
$$
$$
L_C = L_B.
$$
problem_solution_en:
(1) According to the definition of torque $\mathbf{M} = \mathbf{r} \times \mathbf{F}$, we have
$$
M_A \begin{cases}
\text{direction: into the plane of the figure}, \\
\text{magnitude: } M_A = mgd_1,
\end{cases}
$$
$$
M_B = M_A,
$$
$$
M_C = 0.
$$
(2) According to the definition of angular momentum $\mathbf{L} = \mathbf{r} \times m\mathbf{v}$, we have
$$
L_A = 0,
$$
$$
L_B \begin{cases}
\text{direction: into the plane of the figure}, \\
\text{magnitude: } L_B = mvd_1,
\end{cases}
$$
$$
L_C = L_B.
$$
img_cn: 这是一道力学题目的截图。图片顶部是题目“4-1”，题目描述为“如图4-1所示,质量m的小球某时刻具有水平朝右的速度v,小球相对图示长方形中A,B,C三个顶点的距离分别是$d_1$,$d_2$,$d_3$,且有$d_2^2=d_1^2+d_3^2$,试求:(1)小球所受重力相对A,B,C的力矩;(2)小球相对A,B,C的角动量。”题目下方是解答部分，包括力矩和角动量的计算。图中还包含了一个示意图，展示了一个长方形ABCD，长方形内有一个小球，并标注了速度方向、顶点A、B、C、D以及距离$d_1$,$d_2$,$d_3$。背景为白色，文字和图形清晰。
img_en: This is a screenshot of a mechanics problem. The top of the image shows the problem number "4-1" and the problem statement: "As shown in Figure 4-1, a small ball of mass m has a horizontal velocity v to the right at a certain instant. The distances of the ball from vertices A, B, C of the rectangle are $d_1$, $d_2$, $d_3$, respectively, and they satisfy $d_2^2=d_1^2+d_3^2$. Find: (1) The torque of the gravitational force on the ball about points A, B, and C. (2) The angular momentum of the ball about points A, B, and C." Below the problem statement is the solution, including calculations of torque and angular momentum. The image also includes a schematic diagram showing a rectangle ABCD with a small ball inside, indicating the velocity direction, vertices A, B, C, D, and distances $d_1$, $d_2$, $d_3$. The background is white, and the text and graphics are clear.
problem_answer:
(1) 小球所受重力相对A、B的力矩大小均为$M_A = M_B = mgd_1$，方向垂直图平面朝里；相对C的力矩$M_C = 0$。
(2) 小球相对A的角动量$L_A = 0$；相对B、C的角动量大小均为$L_B = L_C = mvd_1$，方向垂直图平面朝里。
